title: For Mountfield RM65 Air Filter Replacement for Models 725V 725VM R25V OEM 118550421/0 Series 5500 WBE0704
features: 【 Replacement】This air filter is a reliable and replacement for your RM65 118550421/0 725V, 725VM, R25V. It offers superior performance and efficiency, optimal air filtration for your equipment.

【Perfect Fit】Designed specifically for Series 5500 (WBE- 118550433/0 models, this air filter is the perfect fit for your equipment. It meets or exceeds OEM specifications, a seamless installation and compatibility with your machine.

【Improved Air Filtration】With this air filter, you can expect improved air filtration, effectively capturing dust, debris, and other particles. This ensures cleaner air intake, promoting better engine performance and longevity.

【Easy Replacement】Replacing your old or worn-out air filter is easy with this product. It comes with clear instructions and can be installed in minutes, allowing you to quickly get your equipment back up and running.

【Reliable Performance】This air filter is designed to deliver consistent and reliable performance. It effectively prevents dirt and debris from entering your engine, reducing the risk of damage and extending the lifespan of your equipment.
description: Description: New Replcement Air FIilter. part suitable for Mountfield 725V, 725VM, R25V. Series 5500 (WBE0704) - 118550433/0. for GHS part number - 8214. OEM part number - 118550421/0. Package Contents: 1* Air Filter
